name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. With a rolling pin, crush the chocolate wafers until finely crumbled.
2. Place the crumbs in a small bowl. Add the sugar and shortening.
3. Blend together until no trace of shortening remains.
4. Press firmly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 7 minutes.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
7. In a double boiler, melt marshmallows with milk. Set aside to cool.
8. In a small bowl, whip heavy cream until stiff.
9. When the marshmallow mixture is cool, add creme de cacao and creme de menthe.
10. Stir well and fold into the whipped cream, scraping the sides of the bowl with a spatula.
11. Pour into the cooled crust.
12. Place in the freezer. Cover with plastic wrap when frozen.
13. Keep well frozen until ready to eat. May garnish with grated semi-sweet chocolate, whipped cream, or cherries.
Yields one 9-inch pie
